idea-plugin.name: Transaction Monitor
idea-plugin.description:
Real-time Spring Boot transaction monitoring — zero code changes required.

The plugin automatically injects a Java Agent into your Run Configuration and captures every @Transactional method execution: duration, SQL queries with bound parameters, batch row counts, and exception stack traces.

Features

  • Inlay hints above @Transactional methods — status, duration, propagation, batch count
  • Click on hint — instant popup with transaction summary
  • Tool Window — full transaction history with sorting and status filter (COMMITTED / ROLLED BACK)
  • Detail Panel — SQL with bound parameters, batch rows, exception stack trace, "Navigate to source"
  • Works with Java and Kotlin Spring Boot 2.x and 3.x
  • Supports nested transactions (REQUIRES_NEW, NESTED, MANDATORY, etc.)
  • Captures noRollbackFor semantics correctly

How it works

  1. Open a Spring Boot project and run it via a Run Configuration
  2. The plugin auto-injects -javaagent — no manual setup needed
  3. Trigger your @Transactional methods (HTTP, tests, etc.)
  4. Inlay hints appear instantly; open Transaction Monitor tool window for full history

Requirements: JDK 11+ for the monitored app. No dependencies to add to your project.
